approval_statement.const: I, edithatogo, approve bounded pilot attachment MuPDF derivation execution request SHA-256 f9dfcedb805e89703a96467b82b6b9486b32ce048fcd21d3e6fa6968c29b3148 as committed in 971e03bed36188cb0aff4bd29d59aa21b51a63bb. I authorize creation of the final executable authorization and one local, all-or-nothing, two-pass MuPDF text derivation of the three exact request 11872 PDF attachments pinned by that request, using source root /private/tmp/fyi-attachment-snapshot-11872-approved and output directory /private/tmp/foio-bounded-pilot-11872-derived. Execution is permitted only after the final authorization is committed and its exact clean-HEAD pre-execution verifier passes. This approval authorizes local PDF processing and derived-content creation only for that bounded derivation. Any nonempty stderr must fail closed and be deleted; it does not authorize stderr-content review or a retry. It does not authorize context presentation, analyst execution, reconciliation, empirical claims, population inference, archive-wide claims, human-reviewed claims, gold promotion, legal certification, redistribution, publication, training, fine-tuning, release, dataset publication, or paper updates.
